name: reins
description: Knowledge / RAG slice for CleanSlice projects

scripts.heroku-postbuild: cd docs && npm ci && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf _static && cp -r docs/docs/.vitepress/dist _static
scripts.build: cd docs && npm ci && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf _static && cp -r docs/docs/.vitepress/dist _static
